detectors.description: LibPosition.wrap(uint8,uint128) (src/dispute/lib/LibPosition.sol#24-29) contains an incorrect shift operation: position_ = 1 << _depth + _indexAtDepth (src/dispute/lib/LibPosition.sol#27)
LibPosition.indexAtDepth(Position) (src/dispute/lib/LibPosition.sol#66-73) contains an incorrect shift operation: indexAtDepth_ = _position - 1 << msb (src/dispute/lib/LibPosition.sol#71)

detectors.description: AnchorStateRegistry.isGameRegistered(IDisputeGame) (src/dispute/AnchorStateRegistry.sol#195-205) ignores return value by (factoryRegisteredGame,None) = disputeGameFactory.games({_gameType:gameType,_rootClaim:rootClaim,_extraData:extraData}) (src/dispute/AnchorStateRegistry.sol#200-201)

elements.name: require(bool,string)(wd.timestamp + DELAY_SECONDS <= block.timestamp,DelayedWETH: withdrawal delay not met)

detectors.description:
DelayedWETH.withdraw(address,uint256) (src/dispute/DelayedWETH.sol#96-104) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(wd.amount >= _wad,DelayedWETH: insufficient unlocked withdrawal) (src/dispute/DelayedWETH.sol#99)
	- require(bool,string)(wd.timestamp > 0,DelayedWETH: withdrawal not unlocked) (src/dispute/DelayedWETH.sol#100)
	- require(bool,string)(wd.timestamp + DELAY_SECONDS <= block.timestamp,DelayedWETH: withdrawal delay not met) (src/dispute/DelayedWETH.sol#101)
